zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Luttrell於大約1456年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset31歲，母親Elizabeth Courtenay27歲。他於1484年與Margaret Hill在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1513年被列為royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi。他去世於1521年2月1日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Luttrell于大约1456年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset31岁，母亲Elizabeth Courtenay27岁。他于1484年与Margaret Hill在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1513年被列为royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi。他去世于1521年2月1日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Luttrell was born about 1456, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Courtenay, was 27. He married Margaret Hill in 1484, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. In 1513, at the age of 58, his occupation is listed as royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi. He died on 1 February 1521, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Luttrell est né environ 1456, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Courtenay, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hill en 1484, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. En 1513, à l’âge de 58 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi. Il est décédé le 1 février 1521, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Luttrell um 1456 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Courtenay 27. Er hat 1484 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Margaret Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1513, als er 58 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Februar 1521 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Luttrell è nato il circa 1456 nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Courtenay, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Hill nel 1484, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1513, all'età di 58 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi. Morì il 1 febbraio 1521, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Luttrellが約1456年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somersetは31歳，母Elizabeth Courtenayは27歳であった。1484年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでMargaret Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1513年，58歳の時，職業はroyal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballiと記録されている。彼は1521年2月1日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトエアスト クアントクスヘドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Luttrell(이)가 대략 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Courtenay(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Margaret Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1513년, 58세의 나이로 그의 직업은 royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi이었다. 그는 1521년 2월 1일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 이스트 퀄토스헤드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Luttrell nasceu aproximadamente 1456, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Courtenay, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hill em 1484, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1513, com 58 anos, sua profissão aparece como royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1521, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Luttrell родился около 1456 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Courtenay, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hill в 1484 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1513 году, в возрасте 58 лет,  он работал по профессии royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi. Он умер 1 февраля 1521 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст куантоксхид, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Luttrell nació aproximadamente 1456, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James Luttrell, of Dunster Castle in Somerset, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Courtenay, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Hill en 1484, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1513, a la edad de 58 años, su ocupación registrada era royal navy on the ship of leonard fiscaballi. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1521, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Inglaterra.
